insights.title: Enterprise renewals dominate revenue exposure
insights.summary: Three enterprise customers account for most renewal value in the mock profile, creating quarter-end concentration risk.

insights.title: Refunds cluster around onboarding delays
insights.summary: Refund notes and support categories point to delayed onboarding as a repeat driver of revenue leakage.

insights.title: LegacyAuth remains a migration dependency
insights.summary: The local graph links billing migration, LegacyAuth, and rollback risk, so platform review is required before migration approval.

insights.title: Paid search ROI is below target
insights.summary: The mock marketing profile shows paid search spend with weaker conversion than lifecycle campaigns.
